ValidationRule.description: Asset Class Focus is mandatory if Company Segmentation is Wholesale or Institutional (Investment decision) except for profiles Carmignac - System Administrator, Carmignac - Interface et System Administrator
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNULL( AssetClassFocus__c ), RecordType.Name = 'Distribution Contact', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account.In__c, 'Retail')) , NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z9hS'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UE'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UC'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000s3v6'), $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Asset Class Focus is mandatory for Contacts related to a Company with Investment Decision Wholesale or Institutional
